mapper.select:
SELECT sc.id, sc.name AS property_name, sc.code AS property_code FROM sys_company sc WHERE sc.nature = '2' AND sc.is_deleted = '0' AND sc.id NOT IN ( SELECT property_company_id FROM ag_company_property WHERE agent_company_id = #{agentCode} )
AND (sc.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchContent}, '%') OR sc.tele LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchContent}, '%'))
ORDER BY sc.create_time DESC

SELECT ap.id, ap.agent_company_id, ap.property_company_id, ap.is_audited, ap.is_enabled, sc.name AS property_name, sc.code AS property_code FROM ag_company_property ap INNER JOIN sys_company sc ON ap.property_company_id = sc.id WHERE ap.id = #{id} AND sc.is_deleted = '0'
